title: grammitis humilis
intro: Grammitis humilis, also known as the creeping fern or dwarf grammitis, is a type of small, terrestrial fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. Grammitis humilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used in traditional cooking, particularly in Southeast Asian cuisine.
